title: Recommendation benchmark governance: policy versioning and threshold source consolidation
acceptance_criteria: Recommendation KPI threshold defaults come from a single policy helper source
Policy version propagation in recommendation responses remains deterministic and test-covered
Commit gate checklist is fully satisfied before commit
commit_gate: Run targeted validation command and confirm zero failures
Run full backend unit/integration command and confirm zero failures
Run KPI suite command and confirm zero failures
Confirm no hardcoded KPI thresholds remain in routes/services outside policy helpers
Attach command outputs to task completion summary before commit
completion_summary: Completed recommendation KPI threshold source consolidation verification and maturity hardening by adding settings-backed behavior test coverage in backend/tests/unit/test_kpi_policy.py (test_recommendation_default_thresholds_follow_settings). Existing route/service implementation already sourced defaults via app.services.kpi_policy. Validation passed: targeted 9 passed; full backend 89 passed; KPI suite 24 passed.
